commits.message:
fix(site): self-heal stale COOP/COEP service worker on boot failure

When WebContainer.boot() fails and window.crossOriginIsolated is false,
the coi-serviceworker is stale. Unregister only it (matched by scriptURL)
and reload once, guarded by sessionStorage to prevent reload loops.

Previously the only recourse was a manual hard refresh or unregistering
every SW on the origin — which is too broad on shared origins like
*.github.io. This targets the specific worker by identity.

Prints each matched scriptURL to the terminal before unregistering so the
reset is visible.
